label: Framer token sync
headline: Tokens into Framer variables
lead: Connect a token repo, browse the sets, and apply values to selected canvas layers, or map them onto Framer variable collections.
asideIntro: A Framer plugin that reads Tokens Studio JSON from GitHub and surfaces color, typography, and shadow tokens in a compact panel.
heroAlt: The Framer token sync plugin open in Framer on a laptop and an iPhone, browsing colour token sets.
aside: Authenticate with GitHub and point at a token repository
Parse token sets and theme metadata from $themes.json
Apply token values to selected Framer layers
Create or update Framer variable collections from token structure

modal.title: Inside Framer
modal.body: Install the plugin from the repo and open it on a Framer project. Connect your GitHub account and select the repository that holds your Tokens Studio export.

modal.title: Token browser
modal.body:
• Lists color, typography, and shadow tokens from the repo
  • Respects theme modes defined in $themes.json
  • Shows resolved values with metadata for traceability

modal.title: Apply to canvas
modal.body:
• Select one or more layers, pick a token, apply
  • Map token groups onto Framer variable collections
  • Updates propagate when token values change in the repo

modal.title: This page
modal.body: This page shows the plugin in a device mockup. The live token browsing and apply run inside Framer: install it from the repo to use it on a real project.
